concerns.text: T034a states 'sensitivity analysis on RMSE threshold over a range of values' but FR-007 explicitly requires {4.5, 5.0, 5.5} kcal/mol. Semantic weakening of FR-007 acceptance criteria.
T036c references SC-003's correlation >0.8 cutoff but does not explicitly state validation must be performed per solvent class as required by SC-003. Dropped acceptance criterion.
T037b documents breakdown threshold 'within 3 Å of ion' that appears nowhere in spec.md or reviewer comments. Silent constitution drift introducing unsupported quantitative claim.
T040b implements caching for repeated calculations with no basis in spec requirements or constitution principles. Silent scope expansion violating FR-030.
T041c adds integration tests that are not required by spec (tests explicitly optional per tasks.md header). Silent scope expansion violating FR-030.
T043 validates quickstart.md but plan.md Project Structure does not include quickstart.md creation as a task. Dependency gap creates unfulfillable verification.
T031 mentions stratifying RMSE by solvent class but does not explicitly specify the three required classes (water, alcohols, aprotic) from FR-005. Ambiguity weakens FR-005 compliance.

Plan.md Constitution Check claims Principle II (Verified Accuracy) passes with Reference-Validator Agent enforcement, but no task implements or invokes this agent to validate citations or enforce title-token-overlap threshold. Constitution violation.

Plan.md Project Structure lists data-model.md as Phase 1 output defining entity-to-file mapping for Principle IV compliance, but tasks.md contains no task to create this required artifact. Constitution violation.
